detect._note: Cartridge header is byte-identical to vanilla Emerald (BPEE01). Distinguish by sha1 or the 32MB expanded size; header-based runtime detection cannot tell Lazarus from vanilla Emerald.

symbols._note: gBattleMons verified live via automap 2026-06-07 (Brionne vs Cascoon, stride 96). A second identical copy reads at 0x020383bc. gPlayerParty/gEnemyParty/gBattleTypeFlags still vanilla and unverified (unused by v1).

battle._note: pokeemerald-expansion BattlePokemon, natural alignment. Field offsets <=0x50 sit in the version-stable prefix. battler_stride (full struct size) is version-sensitive because the variable-size Volatiles blob follows status1, and MUST be measured live.
